# RecordLabels.Views.RecordLabelsTopReleasesView

**Object**

A relationship view from this record label to a selection of its top releases.

## Declaration

```swift
object RecordLabels.Views.RecordLabelsTopReleasesView
```

## Related Objects

- **RecordLabels.Views.RecordLabelsTopReleasesView.Attributes**: The attributes for the record label top releases view.

## Related Objects

- **RecordLabels.Views.RecordLabelsLatestReleasesView**: A relationship view from this record label to a selection of its latest releases.
